mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_EXAM_QUESTION.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO EXAM_QUESTION( ID, CODE, KEY_POINT_ID, LEV, CONTENT, TYPE, MEMO, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG, PARSE, RANGE_TYPE )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keyPointId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lev,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1 , #{parse,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{rangeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXAM_QUESTION SET CODE=#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, KEY_POINT_ID=#{keyPointId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LEV=#{lev,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTENT=#{content,jdbcType=BLOB}, TYPE=#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMO=#{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CREATED_BY=#{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PARSE=#{parse,jdbcType=BLOB}, RANGE_TYPE=#{rangeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE EXAM_QUESTION SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID FROM EXAM_QUESTION WHERE ENABLED_FLAG=1
AND upper(TYPE)=upper(#{type})
AND upper(LEV)=upper(#{lev})
AND upper(RANGE_TYPE)=upper(#{rangeType})
AND KEY_POINT_ID IN
#{id}
ORDER BY ID

SELECT count(1) FROM EXAM_QUESTION WHERE ENABLED_FLAG=1
AND upper(RANGE_TYPE)=(#{rangeType})
AND upper(LEV)=(#{lev})
AND upper(TYPE)=(#{type})
AND KEY_POINT_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT CONCAT(TYPE,LEV) as TYPE, ID FROM EXAM_QUESTION WHERE ENABLED_FLAG=1
AND upper(RANGE_TYPE)=upper(#{rangeType})
AND KEY_POINT_ID IN
#{kpId}
AND ID NOT IN
#{ecId}
ORDER BY ID
